case_title: PACIFIC ACQUISTION CORPORATION VS. SOFTWARE ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES INSTITUTE et al

docket_entries.description: CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF AUG-29-2003 IS OFF CALENDAR JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
FIRST APPEARANCE FEE PAID FILED BY DEFENDANT SOFTWARE ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES INSTITUTE A CALIF CORP
NOTICE OF SUBMISSION OF STIPULATION FOR JUDGMENT

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PACIFIC ACQUISTION CORPORATION RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOFTWARE ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES INSTITUTE A CALIF CORP $42,787.73 PRINCIPAL, $4,800.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $289.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $47,877.23, SEE SCANNED DOC
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SANTA CLARA COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOFTWARE ADVANCED TECHNOLOGIES INSTITUTE A CALIF CORP
